h1.visual_description: Small, serif font, placed at the top-left margin as a running header; likely represents the chapter title.

h2.visual_description: No subheadings are present on the sample page; the document follows a continuous narrative structure.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Foreign language translations or specific nomenclature (e.g., '(die Sandkirche)')

visual_matchers.pattern: Block paragraphs with no first-line indentation and vertical spacing between them
Isolated numeral at the bottom-left margin

markdown_grammar.citation_format: narrative-integrated (no formal citations or footnotes present)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Running header at the top-left ('At Home in Exile') and page number at the bottom-left ('10') should be ignored during main content extraction.
